mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM `user` WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `user` WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id FROM `role` WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT r.role_code FROM `user_role` ur JOIN `role` r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.status = 1 AND ur.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ur.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.real_name, u.status, u.graduate_at, r.role_code, ur.club_id FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN `user_role` ur ON ur.user_id = u.id AND ur.status = 1 AND ur.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN `role` r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ur.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT ur.club_id FROM `user_role` ur JOIN `role` r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.role_code = #{roleCode} AND ur.status = 1 AND ur.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ur.id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM `user` WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, student_no, phone, email, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM `user` WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
